Medium BOOK TOTE Handbag
Grey Oblique Print (36.5 x 28 x 17.5 cm)
Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a key piece embodying the Dior aesthetic.
Adorned with grey Oblique print throughout, the front features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo to elevate the style, and can hold various daily essentials.
Medium style, showcasing Dior's iconic craftsmanship, can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

Includes dust bag

Fits a 16-inch laptop

Original leather GG Marmont series mini handbag
811238 AAECK 6207 The GG Marmont series interprets new silhouettes with classic colorways, showcasing early autumn charm. This handbag is crafted from Gucci Rosso Ancora quilted V-shaped leather, featuring a detachable buckle light gold chain shoulder strap. Magnetic snap closure with double G logo, adding extra charm to the design.
Gucci Rosso Ancora quilted V-shaped leather
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold hardware accessories

GG Marmont Series - The Classic King
Model: 446744. Dimensions: 22*13*6cm
A favorite for all seasons. GG retro design is fashionable and generous. Mature craftsmanship paired with stable original leather. 100% authentic reproduction. Every woman needs a GG Marmont, you must have one!
